title: MBA
eligibility: Candidate must have appeared in CMAT as prescribed/conducted by AICTE for the corresponding year and must have passed a qualifying Bachelor Degree examination with minimum 50% marks under the rules stated on the live MBA page. Final-year candidates may apply subject to passing the qualifying examination with 50% marks at admission.
summary: Two Years Full Time Master of Business Administration with attendance discipline, semester progression, university examination rules, ACPC/CMAT admission path, and syllabus downloads.
authorityNote: AICTE EOA 2026-27 lists MBA with approved intake 120; GTU affiliation 2025-26 lists PG MBA 120.
rules: The course shall be called Two Years Full Time Master of Business Administration, abbreviated MBA.
Minimum 75% attendance is required in each subject of each semester for end-semester examination eligibility.
Attendance status is provided monthly; excess absences may be sent to parents for counselling if necessary.
No candidate may appear in any course more than twice or beyond three years from registration; degree must be completed within three years.
Students must secure minimum 40% marks in a paper and minimum 50% aggregate for successful degree completion.
A candidate securing 50% and below 65% receives Second Class; 65% and above receives First Class.
Repeater examination rules apply within the three-year window as stated on the live MBA page.
overview: The live MBA page states that the course is called Two Years Full Time Master of Business Administration, abbreviated as MBA. It preserves attendance requirements, semester structure, passing rules, repeater examination rules, ACPC admission process, CMAT requirement, and syllabus links.
admissionProcess: The Government of Gujarat Education Department constituted ACPC to regulate MBA admissions through online counselling, adopted by the college. CMAT is required as stated in the live page.
attendanceRules: A student satisfies attendance requirements only if they attend not less than 75% of classes in each subject of each semester. Students not satisfying attendance are not eligible for the end semester university examination in that subject. Attendance status is provided every month.
semesterStructure: Semester I: 8 compulsory papers. Semester II: 8 compulsory papers. Semester III: 2 compulsory papers plus 6 special papers of opted dual specialization, three from each specialization. Semester IV: 2 compulsory papers plus 4 special papers of opted dual specialization, two from each specialization. Project Study/Thesis is equivalent to 2 papers of 200 marks.
careerOpportunities: Management, administration, finance, marketing, HR, operations, entrepreneurship, and corporate roles; exact outcomes and placement numbers require admin-verified data.
faqs: Is CMAT required? The live MBA page states CMAT is required for the corresponding year as prescribed/conducted by AICTE.
What is the attendance requirement? Minimum 75% in each subject of each semester.
Are syllabus PDFs available? Yes, but existing live downloads must be rehosted with correct access permissions.
seoTitle: MBA College in Surat | Metas Adventist College
seoDescription: MBA program, eligibility, ACPC/CMAT admission process, attendance rules, semester structure, and syllabus downloads at Metas Adventist College, Surat.

title: BBA
duration: GTU 2025-26 affiliation lists 4 years for BBA Honours / Honours with Research; live legacy page text must be reconciled with current GTU rules before final publication.
eligibility: Live page states plus 2 (10+2) from Arts and Commerce or equivalent recognized board; 60% aggregate through English medium; final list based on qualifying exam percentage and personal interview. Current GTU admission rules must be confirmed before publishing final eligibility.
summary: Bachelor of Business Administration (Honours) content migrated from the live page with 75% attendance, examination progression, legacy eligibility, and current GTU affiliation note.
authorityNote: Live page verifies BBA; AICTE EOA 2026-27 includes BBA; GTU 2025-26 affiliation lists 4-year BBA with approved intake 120.
rules: Programme name from live page: Bachelor of Business Administration (Honors), abbreviated BBA.
Minimum 75% attendance is required in each subject of each semester for end-semester examination eligibility.
Students not satisfying attendance requirements are not eligible for that subject’s end-semester university examination.
Attendance status of excess absences may be sent to parents for counselling.
Examination/evaluation shall be conducted as per relevant University ordinances/regulations.
A student shall clear the degree within 5 academic years / 10 semesters from registration as stated on the live page.
Current eligibility must be reconciled with GTU 2025-26 BBA Honours/Honours with Research affiliation before launch.
overview: The live BBA page states that the programme shall be called Bachelor of Business Administration (Honors), abbreviated BBA. GTU 2025-26 affiliation separately lists Bachelor of Business Administration (Honours / Honours with Research), 4-year duration, approved intake 120.
admissionProcess: Live page states admission final list is prepared based on qualifying examination marks and performance in the Personal Interview. Admin must reconcile this with current GTU admission process.
attendanceRules: Minimum 75% attendance in each subject of each semester for end-semester examination eligibility. Attendance status of students with excess absences may be sent to parents for counselling.
semesterStructure: Live page states candidates may proceed to the next semester even if results/papers are pending, subject to university ordinances; failed papers must be cleared within permitted subsequent chances. Degree must be cleared within 5 academic years / 10 semesters from registration.
careerOpportunities: Business administration, marketing, finance, HR, operations, entrepreneurship, analytics, and further management studies; exact outcome claims require admin-verified data.
faqs: Is BBA verified? Yes, the live site has a BBA page and GTU 2025-26 affiliation lists BBA Honours/Honours with Research.
What eligibility should be published? Admin must reconcile legacy live page wording with current GTU rules.
Is 75% attendance required? Yes, the live BBA page states 75% attendance.
seoTitle: BBA College in Surat | Metas Adventist College
seoDescription: BBA program details, attendance rules, eligibility notes, GTU affiliation context, and syllabus downloads at Metas Adventist College, Surat.

title: GNM
duration: [CONTENT REQUIRED FROM ADMIN — DO NOT INVENT] Verify current GNM duration and academic calendar with nursing authority document before publication.
eligibility: 10+2 with English and minimum 40% at the qualifying examination from a recognized board; candidates from recognized State Open School/NIOS are eligible though Science is preferable. Vocational ANM with 40%, vocational Health Care Science with 40%, and registered ANM are also listed. Foreign national equivalency must be obtained through Association of Indian Universities, New Delhi.
summary: General Nursing and Midwifery admissions content migrated from the live page with eligibility, reservation, medical fitness, age, management quota steps, and syllabus note.
authorityNote: Live page verifies GNM; GNC 2025-26 permission lists GNM and B.Sc Nursing permissions.
rules: 10+2 with English and minimum 40% at qualifying examination; State Open School and NIOS recognized candidates are eligible; Science is preferable.
10+2 with English and 40% marks in vocational ANM course from school recognized by Indian Nursing Council.
10+2 with English and 40% marks in Vocational stream - Health Care Science from recognized CBSE/State/Centre board.
Registered ANM candidates are listed as eligible.
For foreign nationals, 12th standard equivalency is to be obtained by Association of Indian Universities, New Delhi; institution/state nursing council must ensure equivalency.
3% disability reservation for locomotor disability 40% to 50% of lower extremity, subject to committee decision; 5% relaxation for SC/ST candidates; other quotas as per State Government.
Admission of students shall be once in a year; students shall be medically fit.
Minimum age for admission is 17 years; live page later states minimum and maximum age 17 and 35 years, with no age bar for ANM/LHV.
documents: GNC Permission for GNM & B.Sc Nursing 2025-26
overview: The live GNM page provides official admission terms and conditions including minimum education, English, 40% marks, vocational ANM, healthcare science, registered ANM, foreign national equivalency, disability/SC-ST reservation, medical fitness, annual admission, age criteria, management quota steps, and counselling.
admissionProcess: Admission once a year. For management quota, the live page lists advertisement by Admission Committee, PIN through Axis Bank against 12th mark sheet, registration at medadmgujarat.org, help centre reporting, original documentation/fee steps, reporting to Metas Adventist School of Nursing, and counselling by the Principal.
attendanceRules: [CONTENT REQUIRED FROM ADMIN — DO NOT INVENT] Publish only after nursing authority/admin confirmation.
semesterStructure: [CONTENT REQUIRED FROM ADMIN — DO NOT INVENT] Publish only after syllabus and regulation verification.
careerOpportunities: Nursing and healthcare service roles; do not publish placement claims or licensure outcomes beyond verified nursing authority wording.
faqs: What is minimum eligibility? 10+2 with English and 40% minimum, with additional vocational/ANM routes stated on the live page.
Is medical fitness required? Yes, the live page states students shall be medically fit.
Are there management quota steps? Yes, the live page lists step-by-step process including PIN, online registration, help centre, Metas reporting, and counselling.
seoTitle: GNM Nursing College in Surat | Metas Adventist College
seoDescription: GNM eligibility, admission process, reservation, age, medical fitness, management quota steps, and syllabus notes at Metas Adventist College, Surat.
